questions.question: After Yosys generic synthesis (no PDK mapping) of the lowRISC Ibex core with the default config (M-extension, FF register file, fast multdiv), how many total cells will the netlist contain?
Which Ibex submodule will dominate the cell count after Yosys generic synthesis?
Roughly how many flip-flops will Yosys generic synthesis produce for the default Ibex core?
What percent of total cells will be flip-flops in the Yosys generic netlist of the default Ibex core?
Will the load-store unit (ibex_load_store_unit) appear in the top 3 modules by cell count after Yosys generic synthesis?
Which abstract gate type will dominate Yosys's generic-synthesis netlist of Ibex?
After Yosys generic synthesis (which inserts NOT/BUF/ANDNOT for inverter pressure), what percent of cells will be inverter/buffer-class gates in the Ibex netlist?
How many latch warnings will Yosys emit when synthesising the default Ibex core (which is a clean upstream codebase)?
